verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I Come To You Lord Hoping For Your Care Your Power And Love; Always Be There Lord, I Need You, I Need You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Help Me I Pray, Break Me And Mold Me Teach Me Your Ways

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I Call On Your Name Asking For Your Help Please Give Me The Strength For I Can Do Nothing Apart From You, Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Please Guide Me By Your Grace I Want To Live For You I Want To Live For You I Want To Live
